samples.text:
Once upon a timey cat named Tom. Tom loved to play with his friends in the park. One day, Tom and his friends were playing in the park. They saw a big tree with a big, red ball.
Tom said, "Let's play a game!" So, they started to play together. But then, something unexpected happened. The ball was very hot and had a big message! Tom and his friends were scared and didn't know what to do.
Then, Tom and his friends played with the ball. They had fun and laughed and had fun. They learned that it is important to be kind to each other. And they all lived happily ever after.

Mom said, "Don't worry, we will go home and take care of it." They went back to their house and had a fun day. The next day, they were playing together and having fun.
